seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bonnells Bay and Bonnet Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bonnells Bay vs Bonnet Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bonnells Bay and Bonnet Bay.
heading: Bonnells Bay vs Bonnet Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bonnells Bay, New South Wales and Bonnet Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bonnet Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Bonnells Bay (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bonnells Bay or Bonnet Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bonnells Bay has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Bonnet Bay scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bonnells Bay scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Bonnet Bay scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bonnells Bay or Bonnet Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bonnet Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
